content:
Finnegans Wake, Derrida

✅ Why This Works:
• Ties difficulty scaling into literary complexity.
• Provides a fun, competitive motivation for deep analysis.
• Creates layers of achievement within the challenge itself.

📜 5. Historical Anchor Finalization

Each week’s historical anchor now includes:
✔ Specific historical event before the text.
✔ Contemporary event at time of publication.
✔ Event from modern times (post-publication).
✔ Future projection (realistic to absurd).

Example: Week 4 – The Gothic Mind: Fear, Obsession, & the Psychology of Horror
📅 Past: 1692 Salem Witch Trials → The societal fear of the unseen.
